wordplay_note: Bishop Archer's son and Angel's husband who kills himself
card_description: Jeff Archer is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Transmigration of Timothy Archer*. Son of the bishop who commits suicide partly from guilt and theological despair. Name note: Bishop Archer's son and Angel's husband who kills himself. The collateral damage of obsessive spiritual seeking. First appears in *The Transmigration of Timothy Archer*.

reference.brief: Son of the bishop who commits suicide partly from guilt and theological despair
reference.significance: The collateral damage of obsessive spiritual seeking
